title: cremanthodium pilosum
intro: Cremanthodium pilosum, also known as the woolly cremanthodium, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to the Himalayas. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and improving respiratory issues, making it a sought-after remedy in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine. Cremanthodium pilosum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in powder or oil form, allowing for various applications in traditional medicine.
